name: San Pedro Driving Range and Par 3
address: 6102 San Pedro Ave, San Antonio, TX 78216
about: San Pedro Driving Range and Par 3 is a comprehensive golf facility offering a mix of practice, play, and dining options. It features a full driving range with both mat and grass tees, a Par 3 course, and multiple simulator bays, making it suitable for various skill levels. The venue also provides club fitting services, instruction programs with PGA professionals, and an on-site bar and grill, creating a one-stop destination for golfers and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art launch monitors and motion analysis for club fitting and instruction
On-site dining and bar area for a complete social golf experience
Multiple practice facilities including driving range, Par 3 course, and putting green
PGA instruction programs available for players of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with party platters
Full bar with food and drink specials

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitors mentioned for club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue also offers club rentals and a club repair studio for your convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue has an on-site bar and grill with food and drink options available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify an exact time, but typically simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, San Pedro Driving Range and Par 3 appears to be kid-friendly with multiple practice areas and family-friendly amenities.
